items.acceptance_criteria: Operator runs `es2panda --ets-module --arktsconfig driver/build_system/arktsconfig.json --output driver/build_system/dist/build_system.abc driver/build_system/ets_src/entry.ets` and the compiler parses all .ets source files without errors
items.actor_trigger: Operator runs es2panda --arktsconfig on the ported source tree
items.expected_outcome: All .ets files in ets_src/ parse without errors; es2panda exits 0 with no diagnostic errors
items.request_item: Create ported ArkTS build system source structure with compilable .ets source tree

items.acceptance_criteria: es2panda compilation of test driver succeeds, running the ABC outputs the expected packageName
items.actor_trigger: Test driver imports BuildConfig from types.ets, constructs a sample config, prints packageName
items.expected_outcome: Compiled ABC runs and prints the expected packageName string
items.request_item: Port types and pre-defined constants to ArkTS

items.acceptance_criteria: Compiled ABC runs and produces 'build started' on console output
items.expected_outcome: Compiled ABC outputs 'build started' to runtime stdout

items.acceptance_criteria: Compiled ABC prints topological sort result matching expected order

items.acceptance_criteria: Test .ets driver instantiates ported Ets2panda, compiles harB/index.ets, asserts ABC output > 0 bytes

items.expected_outcome: ABC bytecode file produced on disk with non-zero size for harB module

items.acceptance_criteria: Dist directory contains harB.abc, harA.abc, and entry .abc files with non-zero size

items.acceptance_criteria: Run compiled driver ABC binary with demo_hap build config path; exit code 0 and .abc outputs on disk

items.acceptance_criteria: ark_disasm inspection of entry .abc shows resolved imports matching source references in entry/a.ets and entry/b.ets
